messages.content: Morning check-in. Run the full prosoche. What's the state of the system?

Infrastructure: Docker 21/21 containers healthy, up 3-5 days. signal-cli running. FalkorDB graph at 265 nodes, 218 edges with 0 orphans — running maintenance now. Facts store at 327 total, 0 invalidated.

Agents: 1 active (main/syn), 6 idle, 1 stale session — syn agent session at 8 days since last activity.

Issues found:

gcal OAuth is broken — token refresh failing for both personal and family calendars.

NAS SSH is permission denied from the syn user.

memory-consolidation, mine-memory-facts, and agent-status commands are not found — these look like casualties of the Aletheia rename.

wttr.in is timing out — external service, likely transient.

Graph maintenance ran: 42 edges decayed, 0 merged, 0 pruned. Updated to 267 nodes and 224 edges. Also ran memory promote for syn — 4 promotable items found, candidates written.

gcal and NAS need action. Want me to start on gcal re-auth now?

The OAuth tokens expired and automatic refresh is failing. Need to run the console flow manually — exchange a new auth code for tokens. I'll generate the OAuth consent URL. You open it, authorize it, paste the auth code back here, and I'll exchange it for working tokens.

gcal re-authed successfully. Both personal and family calendars are working now.

For the missing commands — memory-consolidation, mine-memory-facts, agent-status — these appear to be casualties of the Aletheia rename. Either renamed or removed during fork cleanup. I'll need to audit the command registry to find replacements, or we can add them back if they're still needed.

The core system is healthy. One fragility that's worth tracking: single Anthropic API key shared across all agents. One agent hitting rate limits cascades to all of them.
Add a task — one API key per agent.

Added task 9, priority M: dedicated API key per agent. This prevents single-agent failures — like Eiron's rate limit burn last week — from cascading globally. Straightforward config change once the keys are provisioned.

facts: Docker has 21 containers all healthy, up 3-5 days
FalkorDB graph has 267 nodes and 224 edges after maintenance with 42 edges decayed
Facts store has 327 total facts with 0 invalidated
gcal OAuth token refresh is failing for both personal and family calendars
NAS SSH access is denied from the syn user
memory-consolidation, mine-memory-facts, and agent-status commands are missing after the Aletheia rename
Single Anthropic API key is shared across all agents
gcal was re-authed successfully via OAuth console flow
4 promotable memory items were found for syn and candidates were written
decisions: Add dedicated API key per agent as task 9 with priority M

metadata.notes: Sourced from syn/memory/2026-02-09.md morning prosoche section
